summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. REQ-2 backend fields use partyGstNo (optional ?Text) rather than the specified partyGstNumber/partyAddress as new explicit Text fields with backward compatibility defaults. REQ-5 is partially implemented: SummaryPage and SearchBillsPage show party GST via BillResultsTable, but PartySummaryPage GST display evidence is absent. REQ-3 EditBillModal does not pre-populate partyAddress from saved bill data (only from party profile). The migration module does not actually add new fields.

missing_requirements.requirement: partyAddress must be persisted on each bill record; addBill and editBill must accept and store partyAddress; existing bills default to empty strings if missing
missing_requirements.reason: The backend Bill type uses partyGstNo as ?Text (optional, not a required Text field with default empty string). There is no partyAddress field visible on the Bill type in main.mo. The migration.mo does not add partyAddress to bills. BillOperation also lacks partyAddress. The spec requires both partyGstNumber and partyAddress as Text fields on the bill record.

missing_requirements.requirement: EditBillModal displays Party Address input field pre-populated with the saved bill's partyAddress value
missing_requirements.reason: EditBillModal initializes partyAddress to empty string rather than from bill.partyAddress, because the Bill type does not carry a partyAddress field. The saved address is only fetched from partyProfile, not from the bill record itself.

missing_requirements.requirement: PartySummaryPage displays party GST number next to each party name
missing_requirements.reason: No diff evidence shows modification to a PartySummaryPage component or parties page to display GST numbers. The PartySummary type includes gstNumber, but no page-level rendering change is evidenced in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added but performs a no-op transformation with identical OldBill and NewBill types and no new fields
hallucinated_features.reason: A migration file was created that maps old bills to new bills with identical structure, providing no actual schema migration for new fields. This adds complexity without fulfilling the backward-compatibility requirement for new fields.
